mapper.sql: id, version, order_no, trade_no, user_id, total_amount, status, address_id, create_time, update_time, pay_time, ship_time
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `order` WHERE address_id = #{addressId} AND status = 2
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `order` (version, order_no, trade_no, user_id, total_amount, status, address_id) VALUES (0, #{orderNo}, #{tradeNo}, #{userId}, #{totalAmount}, #{status}, #{addressId})
